---
title: "Logistics Service Quality & Customer Risk Analysis"
author: "Lâm Như Ngọc"
date: "2026-05-24"
output: html_document
---

## ĐỌC DATA

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate) 
library(janitor)
library(scales)

#choose.files()
loads <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\R\\project1\\loads.csv")%>% clean_names()
trips <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\R\\project1\\trips.csv")%>% clean_names()
delivery_events <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\R\\project1\\delivery_events.csv") %>% clean_names()
routes <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\R\\project1\\routes.csv")%>% clean_names()
customers <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\Dell\\Downloads\\R\\project1\\customers.csv")%>% clean_names()

```


## Join bảng
loads: load_id,customer_id,route_id  
trips: trip_id, load_id  
delivery_events: event_id, load_id, trip_id  
customers: customer_id  
routes: route_id

```{r}
logistics_master <- delivery_events %>%
  filter(event_type == "Delivery") %>%
  left_join(trips, by = c("trip_id", "load_id")) %>%  
  left_join(loads, by = "load_id") %>% 
  left_join(routes, by = "route_id") %>%
  left_join(customers, by = "customer_id")
```

## TẠO BIẾN

```{r}
logistics_clean <- logistics_master %>%
  mutate(
    delay_minutes = as.numeric(difftime(actual_datetime, scheduled_datetime, units = "mins")),
    is_late = if_else(delay_minutes > 15, 1, 0),
    delay_severity = case_when(
      delay_minutes <= 15 ~ "On Time",
      delay_minutes <= 120 ~ "Minor Delay",
      delay_minutes <= 360 ~ "Moderate Delay",
      TRUE ~ "Severe Delay"),
    detention_hours = detention_minutes / 60,  
    rev_per_mile = if_else(
      typical_distance_miles > 0,
      revenue / typical_distance_miles,
      NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  filter(delay_minutes >= -120 & delay_minutes <= 1440)


glimpse(logistics_clean)
summary(logistics_clean$delay_minutes)
```


## KPI Tổng quan (Executive KPI)

```{r}

executive_kpi <- logistics_clean %>%
  summarise(
    total_shipments = n_distinct(load_id),    #Shipment: 1 đơn hàng, có load_id duy nhất
    #Nếu khách hàng A gửi 3 kiện hàng: có thể được gom thành 1 shipment (load_id = 101)
    
    total_customers = n_distinct(customer_id),#đếm số lượng giá trị khác nhau trong một cột, bỏ qua trùng lặp.
    
    total_revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    on_time_rate = mean(is_late == 0, na.rm = TRUE),              #% shipment đúng giờ.
    avg_delay_minutes = mean(delay_minutes, na.rm = TRUE),        #độ trễ trung bình.
    avg_detention_hours = mean(detention_hours, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
executive_kpi
```

## Trend Service Quality
```{r}

monthly_quality <- logistics_clean %>%
  mutate(month = floor_date(scheduled_datetime, "month")) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(
    shipments = n(),
    on_time_rate = mean(is_late == 0),
    avg_delay_minutes = mean(delay_minutes),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


## Route Analysis
```{r}
route_risk <- logistics_clean %>%
  group_by(origin_city, destination_city) %>%
  summarise(
    shipments = n(),
    late_rate = mean(is_late),                 
    avg_delay_minutes = mean(delay_minutes),
    revenue = sum(revenue),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(shipments >= 20) %>%
  slice_max(late_rate, n = 10)
```

## Customer Risk Analysis  

```{r}
customer_risk <- logistics_clean %>%
  group_by(customer_id, customer_name) %>%
  
  summarise(
    shipments = n(),
    revenue = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    late_rate = mean(is_late),
    avg_delay_minutes = mean(delay_minutes),
    severe_delay_rate = mean(delay_severity == "Severe Delay"),
    avg_detention_hours = mean(detention_hours),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  
  mutate(
    risk_score = 0.40*percent_rank(late_rate) +
                 0.30*percent_rank(severe_delay_rate) +
                 0.20*percent_rank(avg_detention_hours) +
                 0.10*percent_rank(revenue),
    risk_segment = case_when(
      risk_score >= 0.75 ~ "High Risk",
      risk_score >= 0.40 ~ "Medium Risk",
      TRUE ~ "Low Risk")
  )
```

```{r}
write_csv(logistics_clean, "logistics_clean_for_tableau.csv")
write_csv(executive_kpi, "executive_kpi.csv") 
write_csv(monthly_quality, "monthly_quality.csv")
write_csv(customer_risk, "customer_risk.csv")
write_csv(route_risk, "route_risk.csv")

```
